note: Field-level container: 'Analysis' verified as a key under libraries.Mathlib.modules in catalog/data/hierarchy.json (26746 decls) -- the top-level Mathlib directory covering real/complex analysis, calculus, normed spaces, measure theory adjuncts, special functions, etc. Standard field-level home for the discipline of mathematical analysis; no single decl can stand in for the whole field.
verify_note: path Mathlib/Analysis is a genuine key in catalog/data/hierarchy.json with n_decls=26746 matching the note exactly, and catalog/data/articles.jsonl confirms Q7754='Mathematical analysis'; field-level claim (no single decl) is the honest call for a whole discipline.

note: Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/PosDef.lean:160-162: 'A matrix M : Matrix n n R is positive definite if it is Hermitian and xᴴMx is greater than zero for all nonzero x.' def PosDef (M : Matrix n n R) := M.IsHermitian ∧ .... The Wikidata concept 'definite matrix' spans both positive- and negative-definite; Matrix.PosDef formalizes the positive-definite case only (negative-definite is recovered as PosDef of -M), so this is the special_case rather than an exact 1:1 join.
verify_note: Matrix.PosDef confirmed to exist (declaration-data.json + mathlib4 source, docstring verbatim at Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/PosDef.lean:159-161); catalog/data/articles.jsonl confirms Q77601250='Definite matrix', a Wikipedia article that genuinely spans both signs, so downgrading exact->special_case is the honest call, not an overclaim.

note: Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Triangulated/Triangulated.lean:302-305, docstring verbatim: 'A triangulated category is a pretriangulated category which satisfies the octahedron axiom (TR 4).' class IsTriangulated : Prop where octahedron_axiom .... Built on CategoryTheory.Pretriangulated (Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Triangulated/Pretriangulated.lean:65, the TR1-TR3 axioms of distinguished triangles); together these two classes ARE the standard definition of a triangulated category (@[stacks 05QK] tag on IsTriangulated).
verify_note: CategoryTheory.IsTriangulated confirmed to exist (declaration-data.json + mathlib4 source at Triangulated.lean:301-303 with @[stacks 05QK] tag, and Pretriangulated at Pretriangulated.lean:64-65 with @[stacks 0145]); catalog confirms Q7840150='triangulated category'; note is transparent that IsTriangulated presupposes Pretriangulated in context, which is Mathlib's standard split-class idiom, so 'exact' is defensible rather than an overclaim.
